name: Lucifer
bio:
Former Heavenly Light Messenger who became a Fallen Angel due to betrayal. She joined the Demon Faction and upholds her own ideals in her own way, even if it means opposing her former compatriots.

Role: Magical Group Poison
Specialty: A mid-backline Breakthrough-type hero that can apply a large number of Curses and has a strong Heal Reduction effect; its Ultimate also deals massive damage to low-HP enemies.

skillSlots.name: Umbral Barrage
skillSlots.description: Attacks 4 random enemies, dealing 150% M.DMG and having a 70% chance to apply 1 stack of [Eternal Curse].

skillSlots.name: Darkborn Finale
skillSlots.description: Attacks 3 enemy heroes, dealing 260% M.DMG and having a 90% chance to apply 2 stacks of [Eternal Curse].

effects.name: Annihilation
effects.description: Lucifer gains 1 stack of [Heavenfall] each time she successfully applies [Eternal Curse] to an enemy (max 2 triggers per enemy per turn).

effects.name: Annihilation
effects.description: DMG is increased by 20% when attacking enemies affected by [Eternal Curse].

effects.name: Annihilation
effects.description: When an enemy affected by [Eternal Curse] dies, Lucifer gains 5 stacks of [Heavenfall] and heals herself for 100% of ATK.

effects.name: Annihilation
effects.description: [Darkborn Finale] deals additional True DMG equal to 1.5% of the target's lost HP per [Heavenfall] stack (total DMG capped at 600% of Lucifer's ATK).

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: [Eternal Curse] deals DMG increased to 44% of Attack per turn; its stacks become unlimited. Additionally, every 3 stacks of [Eternal Curse] deal extra True DMG equal to 2% of the target's Max HP at the end of the turn (capped at 50% of Lucifer's ATK).

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: At the start of each turn, Lucifer gains a shield equal to 50% of her ATK plus 10% of her ATK per [Heavenfall] stack (capped at 200% of her ATK).

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: When an enemy with [Eternal Curse] dies, their [Eternal Curse] stacks transfer to all enemies on the opposing team.

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: [Darkborn Finale] deals additional M.DMG equal to 10% of its base DMG per [Eternal Curse] stack on the target, and applies 2 extra stacks of [Eternal Curse] with a 100% chance.

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: When [Heavenfall] reaches 20 stacks, Lucifer instantly casts [Darkborn Finale]; all Skills cooldowns are reduced by 1 turn.
